title: Dio-Homelander-Man Origin
description: A combination of Homelander, Dio, and many other powers, this is a pop culture hodgepodge Origin containing many superpowers.
body:
> How much cheese is too much cheese?
> - _Charlie Day_ as _Charlie Day_

## Diolanderman
A mix of cheese, spice, and nothing nice, Diolanderman is almost unkillable, highly destructive, and built to be as terrifying as possible.

### 👯‍♂️ Menace Dance
Dance!! Dancing enough will summon The World, stopping time nearby.

### 👁️ Special Eyes (primary)
Toggle on your laser sight.

Sneak to swap through night & x-ray vision.

### 🥛 Lactic Kryptonite
Being attacked with a milk bucket disables all powers.

Drinking milk toggles your powers on and off.

You can drink more milk to gain them back.

Don't think about it.

Just drink the milk.

### ✈️ Classic...
You have creative flight and elytra.

Holding jump while gliding adds speed.

### 👟 Naturally,
Movement and attack speed are increased.

### 💫 Boop.
Punching launches targets.

If you are holding an item, attacks do incredible damage.

Sneaking makes your punches normal.

### 💕 Wolverine Factor
Heal automatically.

Barely grow exhausted.

Immunity to ill effects.

### 🦾 "I'm the upgrade."
You break blocks four times faster.

Greatly reduce damage taken...most things can't even hurt you.

—————————————— 
## ✨PLUS ULTRA✨
Take off the weights. Go beyond.

Secondary toggle. Enables these powers...

### 🌪️ Force of Nature
Gain massive speed.

### 🍥 Chakra Control
Stand and run on liquid.

Climb walls automatically.

### ⚡ Kitty Allen
Sprint through surfaces.

### ☁️ Instant Transmission
Teleport where you are looking.

Replaces Laser as primary active.

### 👊 One Punch...
Barehanded attacks carve the land.

### 💥 Juggernaut
While in creative flight, sprinting or flying upwards through blocks cause them to erupt.
Violently.

### ♨️ Demon
If you manage to die, explode instead.

20 minute cooldown.


----------------------------------------------------------------

This is Dio AND Homelander AND a few other heros combined.

It is NOT balanced. It is the opposite.

I wanted to make it as strong as possible without literally being invincible.

Though you are, practically....

Invincible

PLEASE 🙏 do NOT request this on servers without being explicit about how broken it is!

---------------------------------------------------------------- 
Remove/tweak/add powers and find Kitty Pryde, Saitama, Wolverine, The Flash, Nightcrawler, Juggernaut, Omni-Man, Superman, etc buried in this origin.

This pack includes two origins, Diolanderman and a "weakened" origin where you can drink milk to regain your powers. You can use the multiple origins as sort of a guide.

To change this origin to...

### Homelander

Remove The World, Demon, One Punch, Instant Transmission, and Kitty Allen

Probably tone down "I'm the upgrade."

### Dio

Remove everything you did for Homelander, except The World.

Remove "Classic..."

Optional: creative flight enabled during The World

Add "burn in sun power" (not included)

Change laser eyes to be blueish instead of red.


You can also get creative...

### Itachi (Naruto)

Mangekyō: Change "The World" to be summon at raycast, and not follow. Edit the NBT to be visible and have no armor (like the "cross" Itachi uses).

Change laser vision to be shurikens by increasing the interval they "throw" (cast) at.

Substitution Jutsu: Change "Demon" to spawn wood logs (or like bats for crows) instead of explode, and turn you invisible.

Remove "Wolverine Factor"/"Kitty Allen"/anything not on theme.
